options.name: -autoPageFaultMonitor
options.description: Get the value of the autoPageFaultMonitor option

options.name: -cpuPerRemoteHost
options.description: Get the number of CPUs available on every remote host (server)

options.name: -gpuPerRemoteHost
options.description: Get the number of GPUs available on every remote host (server)

options.name: -keepLicense
options.description: Get the keep mcpu license setting

options.name: -localCpu
options.description: Get the number of available local CPUs

options.name: -localGpu
options.description: Get the number of available local GPUs

options.name: -localMem
options.description: Get memory in mb available on local host

options.name: -memPerRemoteHost
options.description: Get memory in MB available on every remote host (server)

options.name: -remoteHost
options.description: Get the number of available remote hosts (servers)

options.name: -threadInfo
options.description: Get the level of thread informational messages

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Print a message indicating the parameter and the return value
